text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You and your trainer seem to be getting along
quite well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Okay? Any reason you're bringing this up?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was watching my subje—the hard-working
students the other day as part of my research on
the connection between nutrient intake and
physique, and I spotted the two of you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer must be something special to keep
up with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I have no idea what you're talkin' about.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant. Hey! What was my time?
choice_data_list: I've sent it to the computer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also let Air Shakur know that I've attached a
schedule for tomorrow based on her training
performance today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling good today. I think I can go another
few laps.
choice_data_list:
I'll let you know if your lap time starts to fall
below the standard value.

I'll let you know if your lap time starts to fall
below the standard value.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer must be something special to keep
up with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Well, it beats getting in my way.)
